headline: Assessing Principal Financial Group (PFG) Valuation After Strong 1 Year Share Price Return
summary: What recent performance suggests about Principal Financial Group (PFG) Principal Financial Group (PFG) has drawn attention after recent share price moves, with the stock last closing at US$103.31 and showing mixed short term returns alongside stronger gains over the past year. Over the past day the stock gained 0.4%, while the past week shows a decline of 1.3%. In contrast, the past month return is 2.2% and the past 3 months return is 10.5%, with a 1 year total return of 38.5%. See our latest...
